name: codex-deep-research
description: Async deep research workflow plugin for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run async multi-agent research workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Launch bounded-concurrency deep research runs that decompose questions, collect sources, extract claims, verify them adversarially, and write cited Markdown reports with auditable state files.
defaultPrompt: Start a deep research run about this technical question.
Show status for a deep research run.
Open the report from the latest deep research run.
